collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (43 total Queries, 43 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT * FROM `settings` WHERE `context` IS NULL
SELECT * FROM `users` WHERE `users`.`deleted_at` IS NULL AND `users`.`id` = 7
UPDATE `users` SET `last_active` = '2026-05-07 14:09:22' WHERE `id` = 7
SELECT `group` FROM `auth_groups_users` WHERE `user_id` = 7
SELECT `b`.*, `u`.`username` FROM `bookings` `b` LEFT JOIN `users` `u` ON `u`.`id` = `b`.`user_id` WHERE `b`.`status` IN ('confirmed','completed') ORDER BY `b`.`created_at` DESC

SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN payment_status = 'paid' THEN total_amount WHEN down_payment_status = 'paid' THEN COALESCE(down_payment, CEIL(total_amount / 2)) ELSE 0 END ) AS collected FROM `bookings` WHERE `status` != 'cancelled'

SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN payment_status = 'paid' THEN total_amount WHEN down_payment_status = 'paid' THEN COALESCE(down_payment, CEIL(total_amount / 2)) ELSE 0 END ) AS collected FROM `bookings` WHERE `status` != 'cancelled' AND DATE_FORMAT(created_at,'%Y-%m') = '2026-05'

SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN payment_status = 'paid' THEN total_amount WHEN down_payment_status = 'paid' THEN COALESCE(down_payment, CEIL(total_amount / 2)) ELSE 0 END ) AS collected FROM `bookings` WHERE `status` != 'cancelled' AND `created_at` >= '2026-04-30'
SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS t FROM `bookings` WHERE `status` IN ('pending','confirmed') AND `payment_status` != 'paid' AND `down_payment_status` != 'paid'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS `numrows` FROM `bookings` WHERE `payment_status` = 'paid'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS `numrows` FROM `bookings` WHERE `payment_status` != 'paid' AND `down_payment_status` = 'paid'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS `numrows` FROM `bookings` WHERE `status` IN ('pending','confirmed') AND `payment_status` != 'paid' AND `down_payment_status` != 'paid'

SELECT `activity_name`, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM( CASE WHEN payment_status = 'paid' THEN total_amount WHEN down_payment_status = 'paid' THEN COALESCE(down_payment, CEIL(total_amount / 2)) ELSE 0 END ) AS revenue FROM `bookings` WHERE `status` != 'cancelled' GROUP BY `activity_name` HAVING `revenue` > 0 ORDER BY `revenue` DESC
